title: Living in Boulder vlog 12 -  11  - 18: 100 Virtual Miles. Think I'm getting tired.

transcript.text: Hey, how's it going? Living in Boulder V-Log. It's 8.22 p.m. on December 11th. I slept all day again today, and so that's why I'm getting up to a late start.

And I finally went to sleep, and then I had to sleep, and then I got up, and I realized that I didn't have any more goober. I mean, goo.
